text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Grass Wonder will finally run in her debut
race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes deep and slow breaths, outwardly
seeming like her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I can't help but wonder if she'll be able to
hold it all together. Is she warmed up enough?
Should I tighten her shoelaces?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...Excuse me, Trainer? You seem to be rather
anxious. Are you feeling okay?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're nervous enough for the two of us.
I'm doing just fine.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single
step. Today is no different than any other.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We've waited a long time for this debut... I'll show
you a performance that will be sure to clear away
those nerves.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, I should be on my way.
